hero.title: Relevi Healing: Interactive Wellness Lab
hero.subtitle: Relevi Healing is an interactive project and multifunctional lab dedicated to personal well-being, offering experiences that support physical, mental, and emotional health. It is an inclusive space for all ages and abilities, with initiatives that support individuals and communities.

expertTherapists.title: Expert Holistic Professionals
expertTherapists.description: Our certified holistic professionals have years of experience and specialized training in various techniques.

tranquilEnvironment.title: Our Spaces
tranquilEnvironment.description: Versatile, welcoming spaces: a mindfulness meditation room, a multifunctional gym, private therapy rooms, an educational kitchen, and a creative room for artistic activities.

premiumProducts.title: Premium Products
premiumProducts.description: We use only the highest quality organic oils and products for all our treatments.

whyChooseUs.title: Our Vision and Method
whyChooseUs.intro: Our vision is a welcoming, dynamic environment for psychophysical well-being and personal growth. We integrate traditional and modern techniques through a holistic team of professionals, philosophical consultants, and medical doctors. Natural therapies complement conventional medicine to optimize outcomes and improve quality of life.

personalizedApproach.title: Personalized Approach
personalizedApproach.description: Treatments tailored to your specific needs.

uniPro.title: UNI-PRO Patronage
uniPro.subtitle: Collaboration and professional guarantees
uniPro.summary: Relevi Healing benefits from the patronage of the professional association UNI-PRO, compliant with Italian law 4/2013. UNI-PRO safeguards holistic operators and holistic counselors through professional registers, verified requirements by the Ethics and Holistic Quality Committee, and accredited training schools. It promotes periodic peer review, professional growth, and a holistic culture grounded in ethics and competence, offering support services to professionals and guarantees of reliability to users. It collaborates with qualified professionals.
highlights: Professional registers for Holistic Operators and Holistic Counselors.
Accredited training and schools assessed by the Ethics and Holistic Quality Committee.
Support and protection services for professionals and users.
Promotion of holistic ethics and continuous development.

list.name: Simonetta Conti
list.shortBio: Labor and tax consultant registered with the Order of Labor Consultants of Trieste. Independent practice carried out both in association and individually.
list.bio:
Labor and tax consultant registered with the Order of Labor Consultants of Trieste.
Independent practice carried out both in association and individually.
Multi-year teaching activity in tax, fiscal and labor law subjects.
Member of the commission for the State exams to qualify for the profession of Labor Consultant.
Court-appointed Technical Consultant at the Tribunal of Trieste.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: We collaborate with trusted partners to guarantee the highest quality and professionalism.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Awaken your vital energy: explore our therapeutic paths.

packages.title: Our Wellness Packs
packages.subtitle: Curated journeys designed to restore your body, mind, and spirit. Choose the path that speaks to you.

p1.name: Women's Balance
p1.description: A deep reset combining kinesiology and holistic massage to release tension and restore natural balance.

p2.name: Self-Esteem
p2.description: Revitalise through Chinese medicine techniques and craniosacral therapy for complete energetic renewal.

p3.name: Revitalising Energy
p3.description: Harmonise emotions and mind through flower remedies, herbal support, and guided mindfulness practices.

p4.name: Wellness & Relax
p4.description: Awaken your body with conscious movement, connected breathing, and functional strength practices.

p5.name: Physical Fitness
p5.description: Our most comprehensive package — a full spectrum of holistic therapies for profound transformation.

p6.name: Detox
p6.description: Uncover your unique profile through iridology, colour analysis, and personalised coaching sessions.

packages.paymentSubtitle: Every great transformation begins with a single step. Let us guide you towards the balance you deserve — because you are worth it.

cta.title: Ready to Book Your Service?
cta.subtitle: Contact us today to schedule your appointment and take the first step toward wellness and relaxation.

systematicKinesiology.title: Systematic Kinesiology Treatments
systematicKinesiology.description: Assessment and energy rebalancing through muscle testing and tailored protocols.
systematicKinesiology.fullDescription: Systematic kinesiology sessions to identify imbalances and support psychophysical balance with muscle testing and targeted techniques.

chineseMedicine.title: Applied Chinese Medicine (including chromopuncture)
chineseMedicine.description: Chinese medicine approach with energy point stimulation and chromopuncture.
chineseMedicine.fullDescription: Applied Chinese medicine treatments using energetic rebalancing techniques and chromopuncture to support overall well-being.

floritherapyPhytotherapy.title: Floritherapy and Phytotherapy Consultations
floritherapyPhytotherapy.description: Consultations on flower remedies and herbal support for physical and emotional needs.
floritherapyPhytotherapy.fullDescription: Personalized floritherapy and phytotherapy guidance to support emotional balance and physical well-being.

craniosacralReflexology.title: Craniosacral Therapy and Reflexology Treatments
craniosacralReflexology.description: Gentle techniques to harmonize the nervous system and stimulate reflex points.
craniosacralReflexology.fullDescription: Craniosacral therapy and reflexology sessions designed to encourage deep relaxation and natural balance.

iridologyArmocromia.title: Iridology and Color Analysis Consultations
iridologyArmocromia.description: Iris analysis and color consultation for personal harmony and well-being.
iridologyArmocromia.fullDescription: Iridology for holistic insight and color analysis to enhance personal image in alignment with well-being.

connectedBreathing.title: Connected Breathing (Rebirthing) Sessions
connectedBreathing.description: Guided breathing for emotional release, grounding, and renewed vitality.
connectedBreathing.fullDescription: Connected breathing (Rebirthing) sessions to foster relaxation, awareness, and energetic recharge.

yogaPilatesMovement.title: Yoga, Pilates, and Movement Science Workshops
yogaPilatesMovement.description: Workshops focused on mobility, posture, breath, and functional strength.
yogaPilatesMovement.fullDescription: Yoga, Pilates, and movement science sessions to improve posture, mobility, and body awareness.

mindfulnessMeditation.title: Mindfulness and Guided Meditation
mindfulnessMeditation.description: Awareness and meditation paths to manage stress and sharpen focus.
mindfulnessMeditation.fullDescription: Guided mindfulness and meditation sessions to cultivate presence, calm, and emotional well-being.

menopauseNutritionCoaching.title: Menopause Coaching and Nutritional Consultations
menopauseNutritionCoaching.description: Targeted menopause support with personalized nutritional plans.
menopauseNutritionCoaching.fullDescription: Menopause coaching with nutrition and lifestyle guidance to improve energy and daily well-being.

creativeLabsOrthodynamicPhilosophy.title: Creative Labs, Orthodynamic Gymnastics, and Philosophical Consulting
creativeLabsOrthodynamicPhilosophy.description: Creative paths, orthodynamic movement, and philosophical dialogue for personal growth.
creativeLabsOrthodynamicPhilosophy.fullDescription: Creative labs, orthodynamic gymnastics, and philosophical consulting to support expression, mindful movement, and reflection.

swedishMassage.title: Swedish Massage
swedishMassage.description: A gentle, relaxing massage that uses long strokes and kneading to promote relaxation.
swedishMassage.fullDescription: Swedish Massage is one of the most popular massage techniques. It uses long gliding strokes, circular movements, kneading, and tapping to ease muscle tension and promote relaxation. Perfect for first-time clients and those seeking general wellness.

deepTissue.title: Deep Tissue
deepTissue.description: Targeted pressure on chronic tension areas to release deep-seated knots.
deepTissue.fullDescription: Deep tissue massage uses slow, deliberate strokes and concentrated pressure on muscle layers to release chronic tension. This treatment is ideal for those with muscle knots, chronic pain, or high stress levels.

hotStoneTherapy.title: Hot Stone Therapy
hotStoneTherapy.description: Heated basalt stones placed on key points to melt away tension and promote deep relaxation.
hotStoneTherapy.fullDescription: Hot stone therapy combines massage with the therapeutic benefits of heated stones. The warmth penetrates deep into muscles, promoting relaxation and healing. Ideal for winter months and stress relief.

aromatherapy.title: Aromatherapy
aromatherapy.description: Essential oils combined with massage techniques to enhance physical and emotional well-being.
aromatherapy.fullDescription: Aromatherapy harnesses the power of essential oils to enhance the massage experience. Each oil has unique therapeutic properties, from lavender for relaxation to eucalyptus for invigoration.

sportsMassage.title: Sports Massage
sportsMassage.description: Specialized techniques to help athletes prepare for events and recover from training.
sportsMassage.fullDescription: Sports massage is designed specifically for athletes and active individuals. It helps prevent injuries, improves performance, and accelerates recovery from training and competition.

reflexology.title: Reflexology
reflexology.description: Pressure applied to specific points on the feet and hands to promote overall wellness.
reflexology.fullDescription: Reflexology is based on the principle that specific points on the feet and hands correspond to different organs and systems in the body. Stimulating these points promotes healing and balance throughout the body.

prenatalMassage.title: Prenatal Massage
prenatalMassage.description: Specialized massage designed for pregnant women to reduce discomfort and promote wellness.
prenatalMassage.fullDescription: Our prenatal massage is specifically designed for expecting mothers. Using safe techniques and specialized positioning, we help relieve back pain, reduce swelling, and prepare your body for labor.

couplesMassage.title: Couples Massage
couplesMassage.description: Share a relaxing massage experience with someone special in our dedicated couples room.
couplesMassage.fullDescription: Enjoy a synchronized massage experience in our luxurious couples massage room. Perfect for anniversaries, special occasions, or simply quality time together with a loved one.

naturopathicConsultation.title: Naturopathic Consultation
naturopathicConsultation.description: Comprehensive natural health guidance tailored to your unique wellness needs.
naturopathicConsultation.fullDescription: Our naturopathic consultations combine traditional healing wisdom with modern wellness practices. We assess your overall health and create personalized treatment plans using natural remedies and holistic approaches to support your well-being.

holisticMassages.title: Holistic Massages: Swedish, Metamorphic, Four-handed Biodynamic
holisticMassages.description: Combined holistic techniques for deep relaxation and energetic balance.
holisticMassages.fullDescription: Holistic massages integrating Swedish, Metamorphic, and four-handed Biodynamic approaches for complete well-being.

iridology.title: Iridology
iridology.description: Detailed analysis of the iris to assess overall health and identify wellness opportunities.
iridology.fullDescription: Iridology is a natural assessment technique that examines the patterns and colors in the iris to provide insights into your body's condition. This non-invasive analysis helps identify areas of strength and areas needing support in your wellness journey.

orthodynamicGymnastics.title: Orthodynamic Gymnastics
orthodynamicGymnastics.description: Specialized movement and exercise program designed to improve mobility, posture, and functional fitness.
orthodynamicGymnastics.fullDescription: Orthodynamic gymnastics focuses on correcting posture and improving movement patterns through targeted exercises. This specialized program enhances neuro-motor function, increases strength and flexibility, and can be adapted for all fitness levels.

hero.title: Meet Our Team
hero.subtitle: Our dedicated team of certified holistic professionals brings years of experience, passion, and expertise to help you achieve optimal wellness and relaxation.

certifiedProfessionals.title: Certified Professionals
certifiedProfessionals.description: All our holistic professionals are licensed and certified in their respective specialties, ensuring you receive the highest quality care.

personalizedCare.title: Personalized Care
personalizedCare.description: We take the time to understand your unique needs and customize each session to address your specific concerns.

continuousLearning.title: Continuous Learning
continuousLearning.description: Our team regularly participates in advanced training and workshops to stay current with the latest techniques and wellness trends.

headmaster.name: Francesca Mayer
headmaster.shortBio: Francesca is the visionary mind behind Relevi Healing, combining extensive experience in holistic disciplines with a passion for authentic wellness.
headmaster.bio: With over 20 years of experience in holistic therapies, Francesca founded Relevi Healing with the vision of creating a space where body, mind, and spirit can find harmony. Her multidisciplinary training and integrated approach have made her a recognized leader in the wellness field. Francesca personally guides the Relevi team, ensuring that every treatment reflects the highest standards of excellence and personalized care.

corradoZamboni.name: Corrado Zamboni
corradoZamboni.bio: Corrado studied and taught economics and is an entrepreneur in the health and nutrition sector. He holds a degree in history and philosophy, with a thesis in aesthetics on the thought of arts in Paul Valery. He is engaged in social economics and political philosophy under the light of ethics and critical thinking. He accompanies personal research with attention and expression of the language of words, body and emotions, through philosophy and the thought of arts, in workshops of thought, dance, writing and drawing. An approach that awakens vitality, emotions and authentic connection with oneself, with others, with the universe. He also offers individual consultation and philosophical cafés open to the community.

deniseDallaPasqua.name: Denise Dalla Pasqua
deniseDallaPasqua.bio:
Denise guides people through pathways of wellbeing and bodily rebalancing, with targeted treatments that help relax the body, release tensions and improve self-awareness.

Each treatment is designed to offer a safe and welcoming moment where the person can relax, reconnect with their body and restore balance and natural energy.

treatments.name: Reiki
treatments.description: Promotes deep relaxation, stress reduction and a sense of inner calm. Helps release physical and mental tensions, supporting a natural and immediate sense of wellbeing.

treatments.name: Craniosacral Technique
treatments.description: Gentle interventions on the skull, spine and fascial system help release stiffness and muscle tension, improve mobility and support the nervous system. Brings calm, lightness and a greater sense of bodily freedom.

treatments.name: Foot Reflexology
treatments.description: Stimulation of reflex points on the feet supports the balance of body systems, improves circulation and relieves stress and fatigue. Provides immediate relaxation, lightness and a pleasant feeling of widespread wellbeing.

francescaTonon.name: Francesca Tonon
francescaTonon.bio: Francesca offers comprehensive naturopathic consultations with a unique and personalized approach that goes beyond traditional therapies. Her approach is based on the combination of various natural and holistic disciplines, all aimed at the complete well-being of the person—both physically and emotionally. What makes her consultation unique is precisely the integration of multiple techniques, creating a personalized path for each client.

giancarloPavanello.name: Giancarlo Pavanello
giancarloPavanello.bio: At ReLeVi Healing, Giancarlo offers personalized treatments focused on rebalancing and body listening, with an approach based on sensitivity, presence and technique. His skills include: Detoxifying and Sports Massage, Vodder Method Lymphatic Drainage, Swedish and Anti-stress Massage, Four-handed Biodynamic Massage for a profound mind-body connection experience, Oriental techniques such as Traditional Thai, Ayurvedic Abhyangam, Massages with essential oils, Hot Stone, Lomi Lomi NUI and emotional California massage. Each treatment is adapted to the individual's needs in a welcoming and respectful environment.

massimoGnesotto.name: Massimo Gnesotto
massimoGnesotto.bio: Massimo has embraced and deepened the Biodynamic approach under the guidance of Mike Boxhall, a pioneering English therapist in the field. He proposes a way of working and support based on deep listening to the person, integrating body-mind-spirit and supporting the intrinsic self-regulation capacities innate in each of us. So that Health can once again manifest its potential and guarantee us vitality, harmony, serenity, and fullness.

michelaDolce.name: Michela Dolce
michelaDolce.bio: Michela in search of the Essence that animates her, passionate about paths and walks in nature where the perception of it stimulates psychophysical well-being, bringing lightness to daily life and from this begins the path of knowledge and deepening through courses in nature. Approaching shiatsu I began to understand what my qualities were, this discipline evaluates and enhances the vital resources of the person bringing benefit. With craniosacral it was a real revelation, a bio-mechanical technique of deep listening to the cerebrospinal fluid, both techniques stimulate the person's well-being. There are two ways of walking, one in doing and the other in Being. Walking with the heart is what characterizes me, our walking the earth creates an imprint for the future and that's what makes the difference from the simple step. Girl on the road 👣💚

paoloAvella.name: Paolo Avella
paoloAvella.bio: His mission is to help people improve mobility, posture, and general well-being through a targeted and progressive approach. Thanks to his training recognized by Sport e Salute and the Ministry of Sport, Paolo guides with professionalism and passion every path, adapting exercises to the needs of each individual.
certifications: Adapts to those with motor difficulties (seated protocol)

sabrinaPozzobon.name: Sabrina Pozzobon
sabrinaPozzobon.bio: I love nature and its colors, but also fashion and textiles, fields I have always worked in thanks to my diploma as a dressmaker. From these passions my current profession was born. I can help you study your personal color analysis, your shapes, your potential and your style in just a few simple steps. The right colors don't just change your appearance, they change the way we perceive ourselves and present ourselves to the world.

tamaraZanchetta.name: Tamara Zanchetta
tamaraZanchetta.role: Yoga Instructor · Life and Spiritual Coach · Art Therapist
tamaraZanchetta.bio:
Tamara is a yoga instructor, Life Coach, and art therapist with a personal and professional journey dedicated to awareness and inner growth.

She guides you to rediscover your serenity and restore harmony in your life using breathing and meditation practices. In her programs, you are guided on a journey of self-exploration. Through work on your body and artistic expression, you can connect deeply with your emotions to achieve greater awareness and well-being.

At ReLeVi Healing, Tamara conducts individual and group sessions of meditation and yoga.

programs.name: Shayana Path (9 sessions)
programs.description: Yoga Nidra and insomnia techniques to rest and relax better

programs.name: InLight Path
programs.description: Individual coaching, 12 sessions, for those going through a storm and wishing to restore balance and clarity to their lives

programs.name: The Way of Mandalas Path
programs.description: 6 sessions of individual or small group art therapy: a step-by-step journey of exploration through your Life, a landscape rich in colors and emotions.

cost: Contribution of €20 for lunch and buffet
